evals.prompt: 我想做一个主动道具，按下后弹出选择 UI，选中的效果会持续到本层结束，还要有一个 EID 图标和音效。你先写给代码 Codex 的提示词。
evals.expected_output: Routes to active item mechanics, state lifecycle, anm2 visuals or compat descriptions for EID icon/text, and audio/render feedback before writing a handoff prompt.

evals.prompt: 做一个跟着玩家转圈的小影子，碰到敌人会造成伤害，死亡时播放 anm2 动画。
evals.expected_output: Identifies this as a registered entity or entity-like behavior, not only an anm2 sprite, and routes to isaac-entities plus anm2 visuals and state if needed.

evals.prompt: 挑战开局给一张自定义魂石，但是现在进游戏看到是空白卡牌，你判断应该查什么。
evals.expected_output: Routes to challenges plus cards/pockets, checks pocketitems.xml, card generation/starting card, art/HUD keys, and descriptions instead of only editing challenge XML.
